zh.Toomer, Henstridge, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓絲翠
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice De Toomer於1349年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親John De Toomer17歲，母親Elizabeth Moyne13歲。她於1377年與William De Carent在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toomer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire, Wiltshire and Somerset): habitational name from Toomer in Henstridge (Somerset). The etymology of the placename is uncertain.

variants.name: Tomer
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Tomer, the Biblical name Tamar (Genesis 38:6).
English (Hampshire): variant of   Toomer  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice De Toomer was born in 1349, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John De Toomer, was 17 and her mother, Elizabeth Moyne, was 13. She married William De Carent in 1377, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1414, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice De Toomer родилась в 1349 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John De Toomer было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moyne, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Carent в 1377 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.
